EmailTemplate.description: Email sent to User to notify him any change of Status expect for "open" and "closed"
EmailTemplate.name: Easy Log : Email sent to User if Status changed
EmailTemplate.subject: Easy Log : {!Bug_Log__c.Name} : Status {!Bug_Log__c.Status__c}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello {!Bug_Log__c.Owner__c} !
Please noticed that your {!Bug_Log__c.Name} is in the status: {!Bug_Log__c.Status__c}
Follow the link : https://carmignac-crm.lightning.force.com/one/one.app?source=alohaHeader#/sObject/{!Bug_Log__c.Id}/view
Don't forget to check your notifications or add any comments on your chatter log that can help {!Bug_Log__c.AssignedTo__c} to resolve your case
Best regards !
